requirement:
As a registered user, I want to reset my password via email so that I can regain access when I forget it.

Acceptance Criteria:
- Email must be valid and registered in the system
- Reset link expires after 30 minutes
- New password must meet complexity policy
- User is notified via email on successful reset

As a shopper, I want to apply a discount code at checkout so that I can reduce my order total.

Acceptance Criteria:
- Code must be active and within valid date range
- Code can only be applied once per order
- Discount is shown as a separate line item
- Expired or invalid codes show an inline error

As a user, I want to upload a profile picture so that my account feels personalized.

Acceptance Criteria:
- Accepts PNG, JPG, WEBP up to 5 MB
- Rejects other formats with a clear error
- Image is cropped to a square preview before save
- A11y: input is keyboard-accessible and labeled
